summary: Replay ADR 0368 from the latest realistic 0.178.137 origin/main base, materialize the missing fresh-worktree generated artifacts that blocked the exact-main MinIO DNS replay, rerun MinIO, Gitea, and Redpanda from the merged main tree, and carry the verified result into integrated repo and platform version 0.178.138.

targets.name: Redpanda admin, HTTP proxy, and schema registry

verification.check: Focused ws-0368 regression slice on the exact-main integration tree
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with jsonschema pytest -q tests/test_gitea_runtime_role.py tests/test_minio_runtime_role.py tests/test_redpanda_runtime_role.py tests/test_service_definition_catalog.py tests/test_sbom_scanner.py tests/test_upgrade_container_image.py` passed with `46 passed in 1.08s`; evidence: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0368-mainline-final-pytest-r1-0.178.138.txt`.

verification.check: Exact-main MinIO replay and public publication verification
verification.observed: After materializing `inventory/group_vars/platform.yml` plus the generated TLS, Uptime Kuma, and SLO surfaces into the fresh worktree, `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=minio env=production` completed cleanly. `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0368-mainline-minio-live-apply-r3-0.178.138.txt` recorded `docker-runtime ok=240 changed=7 failed=0`, `nginx ok=46 changed=3 failed=0`, `proxmox-host ok=373 changed=0 failed=0`, and localhost MinIO health plus oauth2-proxy redirect verification.

verification.check: Exact-main Gitea replay plus private API and signed release-bundle verification
verification.observed: `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=gitea env=production` completed with `proxmox-host ok=41 changed=4 failed=0`, `postgres ok=28 changed=0 failed=0`, `runtime-control ok=408 changed=6 failed=0`, and `docker-build ok=216 changed=2 failed=0` in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0368-mainline-gitea-live-apply-r1-0.178.138.txt`. The direct follow-up controller checks in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0368-mainline-gitea-verify-r1-0.178.138.txt` returned `{"version":"1.25.5"}`, confirmed `/api/swagger`, and validated the signed release bundle with status `ok`.

verification.check: Exact-main Redpanda replay and stream contract verification
verification.observed: `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=redpanda env=production` completed with `docker-runtime ok=226 changed=4 failed=0` in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0368-mainline-redpanda-live-apply-r1-0.178.138.txt` after using the repaired readiness source that reads back from the produced Kafka offset instead of hard-coding `offset=0`. The same evidence file shows the role-level Redpanda verify path passed through the admin ready endpoint, HTTP proxy smoke record round-trip, and schema registry subject validation.

verification.check: Build-server reachability from the integrated main candidate
verification.observed: `./scripts/remote_exec.sh check-build-server` passed from the integrated main candidate; evidence is `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0368-mainline-final-check-build-server-r1-0.178.138.txt`.

verification.check: Direct repository gate bundle on the archived mainline candidate
verification.observed: `LV3_SNAPSHOT_BRANCH=HEAD ./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards service-definitions health-probes data-models workstream-surfaces generated-docs generated-portals alert-rules` passed after regenerating the canonical SLO and dependency-diagram artifacts; evidence is `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0368-mainline-final-repo-gates-r1-0.178.138.txt`.

verification.check: Live-apply receipt schema validation and whitespace diff check
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate` passed with evidence `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0368-mainline-final-live-apply-receipts-r1-0.178.138.txt`, and `git diff --check` passed with evidence `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0368-mainline-final-git-diff-check-r1-0.178.138.txt`.

verification.check: Remote validate failure-and-recovery path from the integrated candidate
verification.observed: `make remote-validate` first failed on the build server because the runner images under `registry.example.com` were not resolvable there, then reran the unresolved checks locally and passed `workstream-surfaces`, `agent-standards`, `ansible-syntax`, `schema-validation`, `atlas-lint`, `policy-validation`, `iac-policy-scan`, `alert-rule-validation`, `type-check`, and `dependency-graph`; evidence is `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0368-mainline-final-remote-validate-r1-0.178.138.txt`.

notes: The exact-main replay started from origin/main@6aeb26434724680c6da2162cd3544031b5a93f03, the latest realistic reachable mainline revision with repo VERSION 0.178.137 and platform VERSION 0.178.133 at apply time.

The first mainline MinIO replay failed in the Hetzner DNS publication preflight because the fresh worktree had not materialized generated surfaces such as inventory/group_vars/platform.yml; materializing those controller-local artifacts cleared the blocker without changing ADR 0368 runtime logic.

The integrated closeout keeps VERSION, changelog, README, versions/stack truth, the archived ws-0368 workstream metadata, and this receipt aligned with the exact-main replay so repo version 0.178.138 and platform version 0.178.138 describe the same verified state.

Final validation used LV3_SNAPSHOT_BRANCH=HEAD for the archived workstream ownership checks and confirmed the direct repo gates, check-build-server, live-apply receipt validation, and remote-validate fallback path from the integrated candidate.
